name: SAP
description: Enterprise-grade ERP software with advanced accounting and financial management modules.
longDescription: SAP, founded in 1972 in Walldorf, Germany, is a global leader in enterprise resource planning software, offering sophisticated accounting and financial management tools within its ERP suites. Catering to large enterprises and mid-sized businesses, SAP ensures compliance with European regulations and provides real-time financial insights, making it a cornerstone for complex financial operations.
